label: Brand Loyalty Buffer
description: Strong brand loyalty provides margin buffer, diminished under delegation

causal_translation.trigger_text: Brand influence is present in this assumption profile.
causal_translation.rule_text: Brand loyalty buffers margin — but agents optimize on specs, not brand affinity.
causal_translation.shift_text: Under manual navigation, brand provides strong buffer. Under delegation, buffer diminishes.
causal_translation.effect_text: High brand + manual = +6%. High brand + delegation = +2%. Medium brand = +1%.
